name: Davis Polk
navigation_hints: This page lists Business Professionals careers. Click the link to open positions or 'View Jobs' — it redirects to a Workday board (davispolk.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com). On Workday, search by keyword. Salary labelled 'Pay Range' when listed.

name: Cooley LLP
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find the 'Professional Staff' or 'Business Professionals' section (NOT Attorneys). Click it — redirects to Workday (cooley.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com). Search by keyword on Workday.

name: Dechert
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find the 'Professional Staff' or 'Business Services' section. Click it — redirects to Workday (dechert.wd12.myworkdayjobs.com). Search by keyword.

name: DLA Piper
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find the 'Business Professionals' or 'Professional Staff' section (NOT Legal). Click to open positions — redirects to Workday (dlapiper.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com). Search by keyword.

name: Greenberg Traurig
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find 'Professional Staff' or 'Business Professionals' section. Click it — redirects to Workday (gtlaw.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com). Search by keyword.

name: Hogan Lovells
navigation_hints: Business Services careers page. Click 'Current Opportunities' or 'View Jobs' — redirects to Workday (hoganlovells.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com) pre-filtered to USA. Search by keyword.

name: Perkins Coie
navigation_hints: Professional Staff careers page. Click 'Search Openings' or 'View Jobs' — redirects to Workday (perkinscoie.wd115.myworkdayjobs.com). Search by keyword.

name: Skadden
navigation_hints: Staff careers page. Click 'View Open Positions' or similar — redirects to Workday (skadden.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com). Search by keyword.

name: Simpson Thacher & Bartlett
navigation_hints: Professional Staff careers page. Click 'Search Open Positions' or similar — redirects to Workday (stblaw.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com). Search by keyword.

name: Holland & Knight
navigation_hints: Professional Staff careers page. Click 'View Open Positions' — redirects to Workday (hklaw.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com) with a pre-filtered facet for staff roles. Search by keyword.

name: McDermott Will & Emery
navigation_hints: Business Professionals careers page. Click 'View Open Positions' or 'Search Jobs' — redirects to Workday (mwe.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com). Staff category is 'Business Professionals'.

name: Paul Hastings
navigation_hints: Professional Support Staff page. Click 'Search Openings' or 'View Jobs' — redirects to Workday (paulhastings.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/PH-Staff). Staff-only board.

name: Weil Gotshal & Manges
navigation_hints: Administrative Staff careers page. Click 'View Open Positions' — redirects to Workday (weil.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com). Staff category is 'Administrative Staff'.

name: Baker McKenzie
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find 'Business Services' or 'Professional Staff' section. Click it — redirects to Workday. Look for Business Services / Staff category filter.

name: Baker & Hostetler
navigation_hints: Professional Staff careers page. Click 'View Open Positions' — redirects to UltiPro/UKG board (recruiting.ultipro.com/BAK1005BKH). Wait for KnockoutJS to load job cards, then search. Salary in JSON-LD on detail page.

name: Hunton Andrews Kurth
navigation_hints: US Professional Staff page. Click portal link or 'Apply Now' — redirects to UltiPro board (recruiting.ultipro.com/HUN1002HW). Staff category is 'US Professional Staff'.

name: Polsinelli
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find 'Staff Openings' section. Click it — redirects to UltiPro board (recruiting.ultipro.com/POL1004PLNI). Wait for KnockoutJS cards to load, then search.

name: Kirkland & Ellis
navigation_hints: Staff careers page. Click 'View Open Positions' — redirects to an iCIMS portal (staffjobsus.kirkland.com). All content is inside an iframe. Keyword search is available.

name: Willkie Farr & Gallagher
navigation_hints: Professional Staff careers page. Click 'View Open Positions' — redirects to an iCIMS portal (jobs-willkie.icims.com). All content is inside #icims_content_iframe. Search by keyword.

name: Foley & Lardner
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find 'Professional Staff' or 'Business Services' section. Click to view jobs — redirects to iCIMS portal (careers-foley.icims.com). All content inside iframe.

name: Milbank
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find 'Professional Staff' or 'Business Staff' section. Click it — redirects to iCIMS portal (careers-milbank.icims.com). All content inside iframe. Search by keyword.

name: Cleary Gottlieb
navigation_hints: Staff opportunities page. Click 'View Open Positions' — redirects to iCIMS portal (careers-clearygottlieb.icims.com). Content inside iframe. Category 'Administrative' (id 8718) = staff roles.

name: Orrick
navigation_hints: Staff careers page. Click 'View Open Positions' or jobs link — redirects to iCIMS Talent Cloud (talent.orrick.com/staff-us/jobs). This is a modern React SPA — NO iframe needed. Interact with the page directly.

name: Latham & Watkins
navigation_hints: Professional Staff careers page. Click 'View Open Positions' — redirects to iCIMS portal (us-associatecareers-lw.icims.com). Content inside iframe. Search by keyword.

name: Jones Day
navigation_hints: Staff careers page. Click 'Search Staff Openings' or 'View Positions' — redirects to viDesktop portal (viglobalcloud.com/viRecruitSelfApply). ASP.NET grid of jobs. Search triggers full page postback. Capture RecJobView.aspx URL BEFORE clicking apply.

name: Baker Botts
navigation_hints: Professional Staff page. Click 'View Open Positions' — redirects to viDesktop portal (bakerbottsselfapply.viglobalcloud.com). FilterJobCategoryID=3 = IP Professional Staff. ASP.NET grid. Capture RecJobView.aspx URL BEFORE clicking apply.

name: Brownstein Hyatt Farber Schreck
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find 'Professional Staff' section. Click it — redirects to viDesktop portal (apply.bhfs.com/viRecruitSelfApply). FilterREID=3 = Professional Staff (permanent). ASP.NET grid, search box: #contentPlaceHolder_textKeyWord.

name: Reed Smith
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find 'Professional Staff' or 'Business Services' section. Click portal link — redirects to viDesktop (recruiter.reedsmith.com). May need to click 'External Self Apply'. ASP.NET grid. Capture RecJobView.aspx URL BEFORE clicking apply.

name: Winston & Strawn
navigation_hints: Business Professionals page. Click the portal link or 'Apply' — redirects to viDesktop (winstonstrawncareers.viglobalcloud.com). ASP.NET grid. Search triggers postback. Capture RecJobView.aspx URL BEFORE clicking apply.

name: O'Melveny & Myers
navigation_hints: Business Professionals page. Click 'Apply' dropdown or portal link — redirects to viDesktop (ommcareers.viglobalcloud.com). ASP.NET grid. Search triggers postback. Capture RecJobView.aspx URL BEFORE clicking apply.

name: Loeb & Loeb
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find 'Open Positions' or 'Join Our Team' section. Click it — redirects to FLO Recruit (florecruit.com/v2/app/loeb/jobs). React SPA, all jobs are staff roles, scroll through cards to find the role.

name: Holland & Hart
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find 'Open Positions' or staff jobs link. Click it — redirects to FLO Recruit (florecruit.com/v2/app/hollandhart/jobs). React SPA, scroll through cards.

name: Dickinson Wright
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find staff jobs link or 'Open Positions'. Click it — redirects to FLO Recruit (florecruit.com/v2/app/dickinsonwright/jobs). React SPA, scroll through cards.

name: Winstead
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find staff jobs link or 'Current Openings'. Click it — redirects to FLO Recruit (florecruit.com/v2/app/winstead/jobs). React SPA, scroll through cards.

name: Akin Gump
navigation_hints: Business Services careers page. Click 'View Open Positions' — redirects to SilkRoad ATS (jobs.silkroad.com/AkinGump). Static HTML page, all jobs listed without pagination. Scan all job cards (.sr-panel__title) for the role. Salary in description prose.

name: Covington & Burling
navigation_hints: Business Professionals careers page. Click 'Employment Opportunities' or 'View Jobs' — leads to a Coveo search-powered SPA. Job cards use class .search-results-card. Location shown after 'Office:' label. Some detail pages are PDFs — extract text if so.

name: Shook Hardy & Bacon
navigation_hints: Main careers page. Find 'Professional Staff' section. Click it — redirects to ADP job board (myjobs.adp.com/shook-careers). Angular app, wait for page to hydrate before interacting. URL is already scoped to Professional Staff.

name: Gibson Dunn
navigation_hints: Wizard-based careers page: navigate Office → Practice Area → Positions. Find 'Business Operations' or 'Professional Staff' path. Do NOT go into attorney positions.

name: Alston & Bird
navigation_hints: Staff opportunities page. Jobs listed as static HTML. Scroll through the page to find the role. Click the job title to open the detail page. Salary in description prose.

name: KPMG
navigation_hints: Main page. Click 'Careers' in the header, then 'Search Jobs'. This leads to a search page with filters. Use the keyword search to find and fetch the salary .
